title: EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT - 211info
text: IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects fathers with their children, other fathers, and the community through weekly father-child interaction groups and monthly outings designed to increase confidence and skills as fathers and father figures. All services are provided by fathers. 7211 SE 62nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Fathers and father figures with children under age 5 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 421-0933 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (503) 421-0933 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. No registration needed. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Parent to Parent Networking * Fathers Parent/Child Activity Groups * Fathers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN YOUTH ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD DEVELOPMENT SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE AND TOGETHER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
